keyEvents.text: Goal! Manchester United 1, Nottingham Forest 0. Luke Shaw (Manchester United) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner.
Second Half begins Manchester United 1, Nottingham Forest 0.
Goal! Manchester United 1, Nottingham Forest 1. Morato (Nottingham Forest) header from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Elliot Anderson with a cross following a corner.
Goal! Manchester United 2, Nottingham Forest 1. Matheus Cunha (Manchester United) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner.Goal confirmed following VAR Review.
Substitution, Nottingham Forest. Dilane Bakwa replaces Omari Hutchinson.
Substitution, Nottingham Forest. Taiwo Awoniyi replaces Chris Wood.
Substitution, Nottingham Forest. Ibrahim Sangaré replaces Nicolás Domínguez.
Goal! Manchester United 3, Nottingham Forest 1. Bryan Mbeumo (Manchester United) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Bruno Fernandes with a cross.
Goal! Manchester United 3, Nottingham Forest 2. Morgan Gibbs-White (Nottingham Forest) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Elliot Anderson.
Casemiro (Manchester United) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Manchester United. Joshua Zirkzee replaces Bryan Mbeumo.
Substitution, Manchester United. Patrick Dorgu replaces Matheus Cunha.
Substitution, Manchester United. Mason Mount replaces Casemiro.
Substitution, Nottingham Forest. James McAtee replaces Igor Jesus.
Substitution, Nottingham Forest. Jair Cunha replaces Luca Netz.
Luke Shaw (Manchester United) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Elliot Anderson (Nottingham Forest) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, Manchester United 3, Nottingham Forest 2.

commentary.text: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
Goal! Manchester United 1, Nottingham Forest 0. Luke Shaw (Manchester United) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner.

play.text: Goal! Manchester United 1, Nottingham Forest 0. Luke Shaw (Manchester United) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner.

commentary.text: Elliot Anderson (Nottingham Forest) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Bruno Fernandes (Manchester United) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Matz Sels (Nottingham Forest). Assisted by Matheus Cunha.

play.text: Attempt saved. Bruno Fernandes (Manchester United) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Matz Sels (Nottingham Forest). Assisted by Matheus Cunha.

stats.name: appearances
stats.description: The number of times a player has made an appearance in a match.

stats.name: foulsCommitted
stats.description: The number of fouls comitted by a player or team.

stats.name: foulsSuffered
stats.description: The number of fouls suffered by a player or team.

stats.name: ownGoals
stats.description: The number of own goals conceded.

stats.name: redCards
stats.description: The number of red cards that have been issued.

stats.description: The number of times a player has come on a sub in a match.

stats.name: yellowCards
stats.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

stats.name: goalsConceded
stats.description: The number of goals allowed by the goalkeeper.

stats.name: shotsFaced
stats.description: The number of shots on target a goalkeeper has faced.

stats.name: offsides
stats.description: The number of times a player or team gets caught offside.

stats.name: totalGoals
stats.description: The number of goals scored against the opposing team.
